creator: natbsd@instinctive.eu
text:
Hello,

I'm a daily user of pekwm, I see that the port doesn't have a maintainer, but I would be sad to see it go.

It doesn't evolve much in upstream, because I believe it to be feature-complete (as far as my use goes), but I'm not afraid to delve into its source code should the need arise.

So I'm hereby proposing to take maintenance for it.

The ports already have the latest upstream version and as far as I can tell works fine, I'm filing this only to pro-actively prevent its removal from the ports tree.
